title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at KTC Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at KTC Logistics
jsonLd.description:
KTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About KTC Logistics:
KTC Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KTC Logistics!
